name: claude-hooks-gate-prereq-tracking
tags: gates, prereq, prompt_tools, session_tools, tool name, MCP prefix, strip, checkpoint, gate context, called_recently
body: Gate prereq checks read prompt_tools and session_tools from the LangGraph checkpoint. Tool names are MCP-prefix-stripped in log_tool_usage so both gate and log see the same short name (e.g. "contacts__search" not "mcp__local-mac__contacts__search"). ctx.called_recently(tool, window_s) searches both current prompt and session history within the time window. This is the only record of which tools ran this prompt — checkpoint is authoritative.
